# benchmark.export_vcf { #tspaint.benchmark.export_vcf }

```python
tspaint.benchmark.export_vcf(
    ts,
    labels,
    queries=None,
    *,
    outdir,
    mutation_rate=4e-07,
    seed=1,
    chromosome='1',
    prefix='',
)
```

Write query/reference VCFs, a sample map, and a truth table from a tree sequence.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Tree sequence with known local ancestry (census nodes; e.g. from :func:`tspaint.simulate_admixture`). Mutations are overlaid if it has no sites.

<code>[**labels**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Reference sample-node id → ancestry state.

<code>[**queries**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Query sample-node ids; defaults to every sample not in ``labels``. Must be an even count (haplotypes are paired into diploid VCF samples).

<code>[**outdir**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Output directory (created if absent).

<code>[**mutation_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [4e-07]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Rate for overlaid mutations if ``ts`` is bare (default ``4e-7``).

<code>[**seed**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Seed for the mutation overlay (default 1).

<code>[**chromosome**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [\'1\']{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Contig label written into the VCFs (default ``"1"``).

<code>[**prefix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[str](`str`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [\'\']{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Filename prefix for the outputs.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Paths ``{"query_vcf", "ref_vcf", "sample_map", "truth"}``.
